narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Massive demand for AI chips, memory, and software is driving significant growth across the semiconductor and cloud sectors.

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Positive clinical trial data for weight-loss drugs is driving strong momentum for major pharmaceutical leaders.

narratives.name: Financial Sector Resilience
narratives.thesis: Major banks are finding strength through specialized business segments like wealth management and AI-driven trading partnerships.

narratives.name: Energy and Inflationary Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising inflation and fluctuating energy prices are creating macro headwinds that are pressuring broader equity indices.
